derived.changes: Selected sessions 1 through 3 from conv-30 and six QA records whose evidence is contained in those sessions, then transformed them into the GizClaw runner JSONL schema. Source speaker names and session wall-clock timestamps are preserved on every turn. Because the upstream timestamps have no timezone, their unchanged wall-clock values are mapped onto UTC solely as a deterministic Go time representation; this does not assert a source timezone. The conversation record declares a smoke-contract minimum of one materialized fact per session. Image URLs and generated observations/summaries are not included.
